chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D- 2317 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No.11128/25 2. For orders on office objections 3. For hearing of Misc. No.11129/25 4. For hearing of Misc. No.11130/25 5. For hearing of main case. 11.06.2025. Mr. Falak Sher Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the main grievance of the petitioner is that an illegal construction has been raised on a plot admeasuring 70/80 sq. yds upto 3rd floor at the adjacent petitioner’s house No.H.No.AK- 11/18S.10, Haji Pir Muhammad Road, Gali No.09, Block-T, near Aath Chowk LIyari, Karachi. Petitioner is at liberty to file his complaint through digital App of SBCA namely Smart Complaint Redressal of Mechanism where it shall be dealt with in accordance with the SOPs of SBCA. Copy of this order shall be sent to DG, Sindh Building Control Authority for compliance. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
